description_long: This object is a cluster of angular, faceted stones with a geometric, low-poly appearance, featuring several upright and slanted slabs of varying heights and widths. The tallest stone rises sharply from the center, flanked by shorter, blockier stones that create a sense of natural grouping. The surfaces are flat and sharply defined, with crisp edges and no visible signs of erosion or weathering. The coloration is a uniform medium gray, suggesting a homogenous stone material such as granite or basalt. There are no visible inclusions, veining, or artificial markings, giving the stones a clean, unadorned look. The overall form is irregular but stable, making it suitable as a natural barrier or decorative feature in an urban park or landscaped area.
description: A cluster of angular, medium-gray stones with sharp, flat surfaces and a clean, geometric appearance. The tallest stone stands centrally, surrounded by shorter, blocky stones.
description_view_0: From this view, the tallest stone is prominent in the center, with two shorter stones flanking it on either side, creating a triangular composition.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the depth of the cluster, showing the tallest stone slightly offset and revealing a narrow, upright stone behind the main group.
description_view_2: The tallest stone is seen edge-on, with the surrounding stones forming a compact base and a clear separation between the main elements.
description_view_3: The rear view emphasizes the broad, flat surfaces of the largest stone and the blocky, supportive stones at the base.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature on a flat surface
attribute_pattern: No visible pattern; surfaces are uniformly colored and unmarked, with sharp geometric facets.
attribute_weathering: Surfaces appear freshly cut and unweathered, with no signs of erosion, lichen, or discoloration.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Contrasts with man-made structures but can blend with other landscaping stones or greenery when placed in a park or garden setting.
